Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
63 
CLM_DRG_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Diagnosis Related Group Code (or MS-DRG Code) 
DESCRIPTION: The diagnostic related group to which a hospital claim belongs for prospective payment purposes. 
SHORT NAME: DRG_CD 
LONG NAME: CLM_DRG_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
4 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
Starting in January 2021 with NCH version L, this field changed from three characters
